summary: Frontend-only testing for controlled/uncontrolled input warning fix in Entities.jsx. The normalizeDetails function fix is working correctly - no React warnings detected when opening entity details modals for both Personal and Business entity types.
critical_code_review_comments: normalizeDetails function (lines 64-76) correctly normalizes entity details by ensuring all fields have proper default values (empty strings for text fields, empty arrays for list fields)
useEffect hooks properly call normalizeDetails when entityDetails changes, preventing null/undefined values from being passed to controlled inputs
Both defaultBusinessDetails and defaultPersonalDetails objects provide complete field definitions for normalization
seed_data_creation: Used existing test entities from previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Controlled/uncontrolled input warning fix verified. Entity details modal works correctly for both Personal and Business entity types. All form fields (text inputs, date inputs, textareas for arrays) are properly controlled with default values.
